_comment: Illustrative BLOCKED verdict modeled on the documented BrCA case — a token a trading platform rated 'Normal' while its market was manufactured: a $5.73M headline market cap backed by only $6.5K of on-chain liquidity (0.11%), one wallet holding 72% of supply. Shape matches the live /safety response; values reflect the documented case, not a live capture.

information_mev.label: manipulated
reasons: fake market cap: $5.73M mcap on $6.5K liquidity (0.11%) — price unsupportable
single wallet holds 72% of supply — dump risk

wash_risk.label: manipulated
reasons: thin-pool buy-loop: one-sided buys on tiny uniform size while price climbs
multi-pool price bait: quoted far above the liquidity-weighted index in dead satellite pools
